title: Ippadiye Lyrics Poojai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Ippadiye
Singer(s): Rahul Nambiyar, Mili Nair
Music: Yuvan
Lyricist: Na.Muthukumar

Ippadye enga venaa
thookkikittu po.
enna inch inchaa
kaipidichu koottikittu po

Ippadiye enna konjam
ottikittu po
un idupula thaan
keychain-aa maattikittu po.

ena thottuputta unna naanum
vida maatten.
nee innum oru muththam
kettaa tharamaatten.

Adi podi raangi kaari
ninimey thaan dhoori dhoori.

Adadaaa maamankitta
mattikichu maynaa.
kudhira yeri vandhu
kootti poraaney.

Azhaga thavmirindhu
peththedutha ponnu
anbaa payapulla
thookki poraney.

nee yen usuru
yaarukkumey tharamaatten
ada enna vittu poga unna
vidamaaten.

Hey apple phone-a pola
kayyila edukkavaa
unn apppadiye touchu panni
ichu kodukkavaa.

hey facebook-il unna
follow pannavaa.
un status thaan therinjikkitu
like podavaa.

adadaa en manasu system aayidichu
adhula kadhal ennum virus
pugundhidichu.

market singam ippa
maarula saanjirichu
appadiye thoongidichu
aariraaro.

ye katterumba kadichiputten
vilamaaten.
naan kaalayila veyil adichum
ezhamaaten.

inivera jolli illa
idhupola jodi illa.

Adadaaa maamankitta
mattikichu maynaa.
kudhira yeri vandhu
kootti poraaney.

Azhaga thavmirindhu
peththedutha ponnu
anbaa payapulla
thookki poraney.

Aaalilaadha oora thaediporenda
anga unna mattum
kavalukku kootiporen da

Kaaththillaadha theevil vazhaporendi
naan moochu vida unna mattum
serthukuvendi.

pudhusaa porandhapadi manasu
ippa kudihikkudhadaa.
mulusaa thirudi enna
medhuva anachikoda.

market vandha ponna
manasula vandhu ninnu
mayangi vilundhudichu
naanthaan paavi.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the song Ippadiye?

The song Ippadiye is a romantic and energetic duet that captures the playful and lively essence of love.

Who are the singers of Ippadiye?

The song is sung by Mili Nair and Rahul Nambiar.

Who wrote the lyrics for Ippadiye?

The lyrics were penned by the talented Na Muthukumar.

What is the context of the song in the movie Poojai?

In the movie Poojai, the song adds a lively and romantic touch, enhancing the chemistry between the lead characters.

When was the song Ippadiye released?

The song was released in the year 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Ippadiye from the movie Poojai is a lively and romantic duet that showcases the playful chemistry between the lead characters. Sung by Mili Nair and Rahul Nambiar, the song features energetic beats and catchy lyrics by Na Muthukumar. It captures the essence of youthful love and is perfect for celebrations and parties. The vibrant music and engaging vocals make it a memorable track in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the vibrant energy of Ippadiye from the movie Poojai, a captivating duet by Mili Nair and Rahul Nambiar. With lyrics penned by Na Muthukumar, this song combines peppy beats with a romantic flair. Dive into the lively rhythms and let the music take you on a joyous ride.
stanzaMeanings: Just carry me wherever you want. Hold my hand inch by inch and take me with you.
Just hold me close like this. Attach me like a keychain to your waist.
Once I touch you, I won't let you go. If you ask for another kiss, I won't give it.
Oh no, I'm stuck with the boss. He's coming on a horse to take me away.
A beautiful girl picked up with love, carrying her away like a child.
I won't give my life to anyone else. I won't let you go and leave me.
Hey, like picking up an Apple phone, can I touch you and get a spark?
Hey, can I follow you on Facebook? Can I know your status and like it?
Oh no, my heart has become a system, and a virus called love has entered it.
The market lion has now fallen asleep, just like that, sleeping soundly.
I won't cry even if a scorpion bites me. I won't wake up even if the sun shines on me in the morning.
There's no pair like us, no match like this.
Oh no, I'm stuck with the boss. He's coming on a horse to take me away.
A beautiful girl picked up with love, carrying her away like a child.
Searching for a place without people, I'll take you alone to the police.
Living on an island without air, I need to be with you to breathe.
My heart is newly drunk. Steal me completely and gently calm me down.
A girl from the market entered my heart, making me dizzy and fall. I'm the sinner.
